programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Jamie and fiancée Lisa are shopping together, and to keep the brides from seeing each other's looks, the consultants plan a wild surprise; wedding planner Michelle tries to let go and enjoy being the bride; Shay confronts Randy.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: The entire Kleinfeld team comes together to help Emily, who needs a dress for her 10-year vow renewal atop the Empire State Building in two days; Olympian Queen Harrison faces new hurdles while deciding on her dream wedding gown.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: COVID cancels a quinceañera, and a "non-refundable" vendor deposit hangs in the balance.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A disabled veteran bails a woman's reputedly abusive boyfriend out of jail -- and the boyfriend wants an apology.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A woman went on a first date, and the guy moved into her house; she tries to get back her money for the car she bought for him.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A divorced couple's tax-filing dispute.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A realtor and a contractor strike a deal on a remodeling job; a "friends discount" causes the friendship to fall apart.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A landlady wants her rowdy cruise-line bartender ex-friend to pay the $5,000 he owes her in rent.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her sister for car rental fees and a traffic ticket, and she says the defendant has never had a job, because she is supported by a sugar daddy.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-fiancé over unpaid rent; he says that after they broke up, she pepper-sprayed him.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A man sues his ex-girlfriend for the return of personal property and emotional distress; he says that three months after he started dating her, she confessed that she was a drug addict.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: A man's tire rolls and knocks down a neighbor's mailbox; a car sunroof that leaks during a drive-through car wash; kids amazed by magic tricks; a macho guy encounters bats.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: A prominent psychiatrist and his adult son are killed execution style, and the case goes cold, then an attempted armored d car robbery provides a link to the double homicide.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: After a paramedic is found dead and covered in paint in the basement of her Massachusetts home, investigators work tirelessly for 18 months to find the person responsible.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Margaret Purk is just days away from having her first baby when she is found dead from an apparent suicide; 24 years later, new clues lead investigators to re-open the case.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: In 2006, a young woman and her baby are found murdered at home; detectives discover a complicated romance, a revelation and evidence to make an arrest.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Twelve-year-old Garrett Phillips is brutally attacked while home alone; his killer jumps unseen from a window, and investigators are left with a vexing mystery that rattles the otherwise peaceful village of Potsdam, N.Y.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Star student Brittney Gregory, 16, vanishes from Brick Township, N.J., in 2004; police launch an investigation that leads them into a world of dark secrets and dangerous players as they strive to solve her disappearance.

programme.title: 20/20 on OWN
programme.desc: A mother of three goes missing; her car is found in flames, but she is nowhere in sight; as police begin to investigate, they find out she had been keeping a secret from her family, one that would point the case in an entirely new direction.

programme.title: 20/20 on OWN
programme.desc: A small town girl disappears; police have a suspect, but it's her brother who lays a trap to catch her killer; a college professor wonders if it was his class where the murderer learned how to cover up the crime.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: When fitness fanatic Donna is discovered stabbed to death on a jogging path, detectives immediately suspect her recently-estranged husband, but there is more to the case than meets the eye.

programme.title: Deadline: Crime With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Corey and Monique Kitts appear to be living the American dream with two children, a successful business and a beautiful home, when Monique and her children discover Corey's bullet-riddled body, and the truth comes out.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Twins Marlo and Margo return, with Marlo as the bride; in a cruel case of karma, Margo's sass comes out, and family drama further escalates upon the revelation of a major secret; bride Val needs a gown for her icy wedding atop an Alaskan glacier.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: The sister of NBA star Stephen Curry hunts for her dream wedding dress; Cami Lee returns with her over-the-top mom in search of the perfect black dress.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress
programme.desc: Angelica is looking for the perfect strapless gown, but her mom thinks her arms are too chubby to be seen; Tiffany and her crew of gospel singers are preparing for her holy matrimony, but may not sing praises to the same dresses.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A grieving family seeks retribution after their neighbor clubs their dog to death.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Hospitalized by vicious bees, his dog beaten to death with an ax handle, the plaintiff needs more than a perfunctory apology letter from his neighbor.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A woman says the used BMW she purchased is a "lemon.".

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: Veteran big-rig drivers duel it out in the courtroom over the fairness of wages.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: When a financial adviser with a drug problem is incarcerated for stealing a trailer, her estranged sister bails her out and puts a roof over her head; she repays her by walking out and leaving her 8-year-old son unattended.

programme.title: Hot Bench
programme.desc: A delivery driver decides to knock back a few beers before his morning shift; a pot-smoking landlord charges his pot-smoking tenant with getting the smell out of his carpet.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman says her ex-boyfriend smacked her in the face and destroyed her property in a jealous rage; he says she set two of his suitcases on fire and destroyed his clothes.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her ex-boyfriend for repayment of loans and property damages; she says that after they moved in together, he became emotionally and physically abusive.

programme.title: Judge Mathis
programme.desc: A woman sues her sister for repayment of two loans and accuses her of joining a gang when she was 13 years old.

programme.title: America's Funniest Home Videos
programme.desc: Video highlights include Easter egg hunts, a dog who thinks his shadow belongs to another dog, a boy's toy drone gets caught in his mother's hair, and a musical salute to hamsters eating.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After winning $1 million on a Florida scratcher, a couple realizes their dream of owning their own house and land in North Port, Fla.; she wants a gourmet kitchen and resort pool, and he wants huge backyard to grow fruit trees.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A self-confessed computer nerd finally came up with a $1 million win after consistently spending $6 a week on lottery tickets; it's up to David Bromstad to help him find the perfect bachelor pad in the historic seaside town of Milford, Conn.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Bill and Eric hit the jackpot on the St. Patrick's Day lottery and couldn't believe their good luck; the happy couple and their twins need David's help finding a larger family home on Chicago's classy North Shore.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: Jesus never won more than a hundred dollars from the lottery, until his luck changed when he bought a $20 scratcher that netted him a $4 million win; this car-crazy millionaire now needs a new pad to house all his flashy new rides in Kankakee, Ill.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A dedicated wife, mother and lottery player with a daily scratch ticket ritual was finally rewarded after seven years of perseverance; her $1 million win has her family looking for a dream home in Western Massachusetts.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After purchasing a scratch card at a local garage and winning a million dollars, Scott and Paige are looking to upgrade their family home in Champaign, Ill.; David Bromstad sets out with the couple to help them find the perfect property.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: A lottery skeptic won $1 million on the first scratch ticket she ever bought; now, with the help of property ace David Bromstad, she and her husband set out to buy the perfect retirement palace in sunny Florida.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After the rise of Silicon Valley, a couple in nearby San Jose, Calif., that never owned a home thought they would rent forever until he won $1 million on a scratch-off; David Bromstad is ready to help them find their dream home.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: After renting a holiday cabin at the same lake for 36 years, a couple's $2 million Florida State Lottery win means they can now make it a permanent second home; traveling to Dale Hollow Lake, David unlocks a hidden paradise in Tennessee.

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: A team of ex-special forces soldiers on the lam from the military police (even though they didn't really commit the crime for which they'd been imprisoned) leaves a trail of explosions in its wake. But Hannibal, Faceman, B.A. and Murdock always stop to help the little guy against some corrupt local bigwig before escaping the MPs once again.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Lives hang in the balance as detectives and prosecutors pursue justice in New York City. In cases ripped from the headlines, police investigate serious and often deadly crimes, weighing the evidence and questioning the suspects until someone is taken into custody. The district attorney's office then builds a case to convict the perpetrator by proving them guilty beyond a reasonable doubt. Working

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: In this action-comedy, unusual circumstances find big, brawny cop John Kimble (Arnold Schwarzenegger) posing as a kindergarten teacher in order to apprehend major drug lord Cullen Crisp (Richard Tyson), as well as his ruthless accomplice and mother, Eleanor (Carroll Baker). While pretending to be a kid-friendly instructor, Kimble falls for pretty fellow teacher Joyce Palmieri (Penelope Ann Miller)

programme.title: A Bronx Tale
programme.desc: As he grows into a teenager on the streets of the Bronx in the socially turbulent 1960s, Calogero gets taken under the wing of neighborhood mobster Sonny. Sonny initiates the boy into the ways of gangland life, in direct conflict with his straight-arrow bus driver father. But when Calogero falls for his African-American classmate, Jane, the repercussions threaten the entire neighborhood.

programme.title: Bones
programme.desc: Dr. Temperance Brennan, a forensic anthropologist who works at the Jeffersonian Institution and also writes books, has an impressive ability to read clues from victims' bones. Consequently, law enforcement calls her to assist with investigations when remains are so badly decomposed, burned or destroyed that standard identification methods are useless. Brennan is teamed with Special Agent Seeley Bo

programme.title: Bones

programme.title: Sanford & Son
programme.desc: Junk dealer Fred Sanford runs roughshod over his son and partner, Lamont, in a groundbreaking sitcom. Fred's moneymaking schemes routinely backfire, and he does just about anything to get out of working -- up to and including faking a heart attack. He's rude, sarcastic, outspoken, overtly prejudiced, and pretty darn nasty to his friends and family.
